metadata.note: Output used as-is without manual revision or selection.

causal_texts: The glass slipped from Maria's hand. The glass fell to the floor. The glass broke into many pieces. Maria swept the floor carefully.
The sharp knife slipped from the board. The sharp knife punctured the plastic bottle. Water leaked from the plastic bottle. The cook wiped the water carefully.
The hot coffee spilled over the mug. The hot coffee stained the white tablecloth. The server removed the white tablecloth. The server washed the white tablecloth.
The baker placed the raw dough into the oven. The raw dough rose steadily in the oven. The bread turned a brown color. The baker removed the bread.
The pot boiled over the hot stove. Soup splashed onto the metal burner. The metal burner hissed from the soup. The chef turned off the hot stove.
The waiter dropped the large food tray. The large food tray crashed onto the tile. Food scattered across the hard tile. The manager apologized to the customers.
The girl squeezed the fresh yellow lemon. Lemon juice squirted into the girl's eye. The girl cried out in sharp pain. The mother rinsed the eye with water.
The dog bumped the small wooden table. The vase fell from the small wooden table. The vase shattered on the brick floor. The owner swept the brick floor cautiously.
The chef poured oil into the pan. The oil popped violently in the pan. A hot grease drop burned the chef's arm. The chef applied ice to the burn.
The cat pushed the plastic food bowl. The plastic food bowl slid across the floor. The plastic food bowl hit the wall. The cat ate the spilled food.
Dark clouds gathered in the gray sky. Heavy rain fell onto the dry fields. The dry fields soaked up the rain. Green grass grew across the fields.
The strong wind blew the oak tree. The oak tree lost many green leaves. The green leaves scattered across the lawn. The gardener raked the green leaves.
The bright sun melted the thick snow. The thick snow turned into cold water. The cold water flowed down the hill. The cold water formed a large puddle.
The lightning struck the tall pine tree. The tall pine tree caught fire immediately. The fire spread to the dry bushes. The firefighters extinguished the fire with hoses.
The cold frost covered the red roses. The red roses withered from the freezing temperatures. The gardener pruned the red roses. The red roses survived the harsh winter.
The earthquake shook the small brick house. The small brick house developed large cracks. The roof collapsed onto the living room floor. The construction crew rebuilt the small brick house.
The flooded river breached the stone dam. The flooded river rushed into the quiet valley. The flooded river submerged the wooden bridge. The town built a new wooden bridge.
The heavy snow accumulated on the thin roof. The thin roof groaned under the heavy snow. The wooden beams snapped from the weight. The house suffered severe structural damage.
The hot summer sun baked the wet mud. The wet mud dried into hard dirt. A small lizard crawled across the hard dirt. The small lizard hid under a flat rock.
The gentle breeze blew the dandelion seeds. The dandelion seeds floated across the wide meadow. The dandelion seeds landed in the soft dirt. New dandelions sprouted in the soft dirt.
The pitcher threw the white baseball fast. The batter hit the white baseball hard. The white baseball flew over the tall fence. The crowd cheered for the successful run.
The runner tripped on the loose shoelace. The runner fell onto the rough track. The rough track scraped the runner's knee. The medic bandaged the scraped knee carefully.
The swimmer dove into the cold pool. The cold pool water chilled the swimmer's body. The swimmer swam quickly to the opposite side. The swimmer exited the cold pool shivering.
The soccer player kicked the spotted ball. The spotted ball soared toward the net. The goalkeeper caught the spotted ball. The goalkeeper threw the spotted ball to a teammate.
The cyclist pedaled the mountain bike up the hill. The mountain bike hit a large sharp rock. The front tire lost all air pressure. The cyclist patched the flat front tire.
The archer pulled the tight bowstring back. The archer released the sharp wooden arrow. The sharp wooden arrow hit the round target. The archer smiled at the accurate shot.
The boxer threw a strong left punch. The strong left punch struck the opponent's jaw. The opponent collapsed onto the boxing ring floor. The referee counted to ten loudly.
The gymnast jumped from the wooden springboard. The gymnast flipped gracefully in the air. The gymnast landed firmly on the blue mat. The judges awarded the gymnast high scores.
The skier descended the steep snowy mountain. The skier hit an unexpected ice patch. The skier tumbled down the steep snowy mountain. The rescue team assisted the injured skier.
The basketball player shot the orange ball. The orange ball bounced off the metal rim. The center grabbed the orange ball quickly. The center scored a quick two points.
The driver turned the metal ignition key. The car engine roared to loud life. The driver pressed the gas pedal firmly. The car sped down the empty highway.
The red car ignored the red stoplight. The red car crashed into the blue truck. The blue truck suffered a large dent. The police officer wrote a traffic ticket.
The sharp nail punctured the rubber tire. The rubber tire deflated on the highway shoulder. The mechanic removed the rubber tire. The mechanic installed a new rubber tire.
The cargo train traveled along the steel tracks. The steel tracks vibrated under the heavy weight. A small rock fell onto the steel tracks. The cargo train crushed the small rock.
The pilot started the airplane jet engines. The airplane accelerated down the long runway. The airplane lifted into the cloudy sky. The passengers relaxed in the comfortable seats.
The boat captain steered the wooden ship. The wooden ship hit a hidden sandbar. The wooden ship became stuck in the sand. The crew waited for the high tide.
The delivery truck hit a deep pothole. A cardboard box bounced out of the delivery truck. The cardboard box broke open on the street. The driver retrieved the scattered contents.
The motorcycle rider twisted the right throttle. The motorcycle jumped forward with great speed. The motorcycle rider lost balance on the curve. The motorcycle slid into the grassy ditch.
The garbage truck lifted the plastic dumpster. The garbage truck emptied the plastic dumpster. The garbage truck lowered the plastic dumpster. The garbage truck drove to the next house.
The snowplow pushed the thick white snow. The thick white snow formed high snow banks. A buried car emerged from the thick white snow. The car owner thanked the snowplow driver.
The employee typed a long digital document. The computer screen froze without any warning. The employee pressed the computer power button. The computer screen turned completely black.
The worker spilled sweet tea onto the keyboard. The keyboard shorted out from the sweet tea. The worker unplugged the keyboard. The worker requested a replacement keyboard.
The printer jammed the thick white paper. The office manager opened the printer tray. The office manager pulled the thick white paper. The printer resumed normal printing operations.
The CEO announced a new company policy. The employees disliked the new company policy. Many employees resigned from the large company. The CEO cancelled the new company policy.
The developer wrote new software code. The new software code contained a major bug. The major bug crashed the entire system. The developer fixed the major bug immediately.
The phone rang loudly on the desk. The secretary answered the ringing phone. A client requested an urgent business meeting. The secretary scheduled the urgent business meeting.
The intern dropped the stack of folders. The folders spilled papers across the floor. The intern gathered the scattered papers quickly. The intern reorganized the folders in alphabetical order.

The presentation projector overheated during the meeting. The presentation projector shut down completely. The presenter used printed paper handouts instead. The audience read the printed paper handouts.
The heavy stapler fell off the wooden desk. The heavy stapler broke a plastic piece. The plastic piece flew under the wooden desk. The employee threw the heavy stapler away.
The hacker breached the main server firewall. The hacker stole sensitive customer data. The security team detected the server breach. The security team locked the main server.
The farmer planted corn seeds in the spring. Rain nourished the young corn plants. The young corn plants grew tall and green. The farmer harvested the corn in the autumn.
The heavy tractor plowed the dirt field. The heavy tractor hit a large hidden stump. The large hidden stump broke the plow blade. The farmer bought a new plow blade.
The hungry rabbits entered the vegetable garden. The hungry rabbits ate the green lettuce. The gardener discovered the green lettuce. The gardener built a tall wire fence.
The bright sunlight shone on the sunflower. The sunflower turned toward the bright sunlight. The sunflower produced many black seeds. Small birds ate the many black seeds.
The weed grew rapidly near the tomato plant. The weed stole water from the tomato plant. The tomato plant wilted from the lack of water. The gardener pulled the weed from the soil.
The apple fell from the tall apple tree. The apple landed in the green grass. A brown worm entered the apple. A bird ate the brown worm.
The farmer milked the black cow. The farmer filled a metal bucket with milk. A stray cat knocked over the metal bucket. The milk spilled onto the barn floor.
The chicken laid a large white egg. A sneaky snake entered the chicken coop. The sneaky snake swallowed the large white egg. The chicken squawked loudly at the sneaky snake.
The sheep grew a thick wool coat. The shepherd sheared the thick wool coat. The shepherd spun the wool into soft yarn. The shepherd knitted a warm winter sweater.
The pig escaped from the wooden pigpen. The pig ran into the muddy swamp. The farmer chased the pig into the muddy swamp. The farmer caught the pig.
The artist mixed blue and yellow paint. The mixture formed a bright green color. The artist applied the bright green color to the canvas. The canvas depicted a lush green forest.
The sculptor chiseled the solid marble block. A piece of the solid marble block chipped off. The solid marble block resembled a human face. The sculptor polished the human face smoothly.
The potter centered the clay on the wheel. The potter shaped the clay into a tall vase. The potter baked the tall vase in the kiln. The tall vase hardened in the kiln.
The tailor cut the red silk fabric. The tailor sewed the red silk fabric together. The red silk fabric became a beautiful dress. A customer purchased the beautiful dress.
The writer drafted a long fiction novel. The writer submitted the long fiction novel to a publisher. The publisher printed the long fiction novel. Readers enjoyed the long fiction novel.
The musician tuned the acoustic guitar strings. The musician played a sad beautiful song. The audience listened to the sad beautiful song. The audience clapped loudly for the musician.

The photographer captured a picture of the sunset. The photographer developed the picture in the darkroom. The photographer framed the sunset picture. The photographer hung the framed sunset picture on the wall.
The glassblower melted the raw clear glass. The glassblower blew air into the raw clear glass. The raw clear glass expanded into a round bowl. The round bowl cooled on the metal table.
The knitter dropped a single wooden needle. The knitted scarf unraveled slightly on the couch. The knitter picked up the single wooden needle. The knitter fixed the knitted scarf.
The carpenter measured the long wooden plank. The carpenter sawed the long wooden plank in half. The carpenter built a small wooden bookshelf. The carpenter painted the small wooden bookshelf white.
The child spilled dark juice on the carpet. The dark juice left a stubborn purple stain. The parent scrubbed the stubborn purple stain with soap. The carpet looked perfectly clean again.
The washing machine agitated the dirty laundry. The washing machine leaked soapy water onto the floor. The homeowner stopped the washing machine. The homeowner mopped the soapy water.
The maid sprayed glass cleaner on the mirror. The maid wiped the mirror with a paper towel. The mirror reflected the bright room clearly. The maid smiled at the clean mirror.
The trash bag tore at the bottom seam. Garbage fell onto the kitchen floor. The boy grabbed a new trash bag. The boy placed the garbage into the new trash bag.
The vacuum cleaner sucked up the thick dust. The vacuum cleaner bag became completely full. The vacuum cleaner lost all suction power. The user replaced the vacuum cleaner bag.
The sink drain clogged with dirty food scraps. Dirty water filled the metal sink basin. The plumber used a plunger on the sink drain. The dirty water drained away quickly.
The homeowner dusted the wooden ceiling fan. Dust bunnies fell onto the living room sofa. The homeowner vacuumed the living room sofa. The living room smelled fresh and clean.
The wet sponge wiped the dirty kitchen counter. The wet sponge gathered sticky bread crumbs. The person rinsed the wet sponge in the sink. The person squeezed the wet sponge dry.

The dishwasher washed the ceramic plates with hot water. The dishwasher dried the ceramic plates with hot air. The man removed the clean ceramic plates. The man stacked the ceramic plates in the cabinet.
The broom swept the loose dirt into a pile. The dustpan scooped up the loose dirt pile. The woman dumped the loose dirt into the trash. The woman returned the broom to the closet.
The wild bear smelled the sweet honey. The wild bear climbed the tall pine tree. The wild bear destroyed the natural beehive. Angry bees stung the wild bear.
The golden retriever chased the gray squirrel. The gray squirrel climbed a wooden telephone pole. The golden retriever barked at the wooden telephone pole. The gray squirrel escaped safely.

The playful kitten swatted the yarn ball. The yarn ball rolled under the living room couch. The playful kitten crawled under the living room couch. The playful kitten fell asleep under the living room couch.
The green frog sat on the lily pad. A buzzing fly flew past the lily pad. The green frog snapped the buzzing fly with a long tongue. The green frog swallowed the buzzing fly.
The hungry wolf stalked the small deer. The small deer heard a snapping twig. The small deer ran away quickly into the forest. The hungry wolf lost the evening meal.
The colorful parrot escaped from the metal cage. The colorful parrot flew out the open window. The colorful parrot landed on a nearby roof. The owner lured the colorful parrot back with treats.
The curious raccoon opened the outdoor trash can. The curious raccoon found a discarded pizza slice. The curious raccoon ate the discarded pizza slice. The curious raccoon returned to the dark woods.
The small mouse scurried across the kitchen floor. The small mouse grabbed a piece of yellow cheese. A wooden mousetrap snapped shut loudly. The small mouse dodged the wooden mousetrap barely.
The large eagle soared high in the sky. The large eagle spotted a fish in the lake. The large eagle dived toward the lake surface. The large eagle caught the fish in sharp talons.

The pet hamster ran on the plastic squeaky wheel. The plastic squeaky wheel broke off the cage mount. The pet hamster fell onto the soft wood shavings. The pet hamster burrowed into the soft wood shavings.
The child blew a large pink bubble. The large pink bubble popped loudly. Sticky pink gum stuck to the child's nose. The child washed the sticky pink gum off.
The magician waved a black magic wand. A white dove appeared from an empty top hat. The white dove flew across the theater stage. The audience cheered for the magic trick.
The heavy chandelier swung from the high ceiling. The heavy chandelier detached from the metal hook. The heavy chandelier shattered on the marble floor. The hotel staff cleaned the broken glass.
The hiker climbed the steep rocky trail. The hiker reached the high mountain summit. The hiker took a beautiful photograph of the valley. The hiker descended the steep rocky trail carefully.
The camper pitched a green tent in the woods. A heavy rainstorm soaked the green tent. The camper moved into the sturdy wooden cabin. The camper slept warmly inside the sturdy wooden cabin.
The pirate dug a deep hole in the sand. The pirate found a wooden treasure chest. The pirate opened the wooden treasure chest. Gold coins sparkled in the bright sunlight.

The scientist mixed two clear chemical liquids. The two clear chemical liquids turned a bright blue. The bright blue liquid bubbled over the glass beaker. The scientist recorded the chemical reaction.
The little boy lost a shiny red balloon. The shiny red balloon floated into the blue sky. The shiny red balloon vanished behind a fluffy cloud. The little boy cried for a short moment.

The teenager dropped a modern smartphone on the sidewalk. The modern smartphone screen cracked into many lines. The teenager brought the modern smartphone to a repair shop. The repair shop fixed the modern smartphone screen.

The detective found a muddy footprint near the door. The detective followed the muddy footprint to a parked car. The detective discovered a stolen necklace inside the parked car. The detective arrested the jewelry thief.
noncausal_texts: A baker sold warm bread at the market. A fiddler played cheerful tunes near the fountain. Two children fed pigeons beside the well. A farmer weighed ripe apples on a scale.

A police officer directed traffic at the busy intersection. A street sweeper cleaned dirty gutters along the wide avenue. A mail carrier delivered thick envelopes to brick houses. A hotdog vendor sold hot meals to hungry tourists.

A talented busker sang lively songs inside the subway station. A busy commuter ran toward the departing electric train. A tourist photographed the tall bronze statue in the plaza. A local artist painted a colorful mural on a brick wall.

A window washer cleaned the high glass panes of the skyscraper. A taxi driver navigated the yellow cab through congested streets. A courier rode a swift bicycle past the slow traffic. A businesswoman carried a leather briefcase into a corporate building.

A young skater jumped a concrete staircase in the park. A jazz saxophonist played smooth melodies on a corner stage. A street vendor roasted sweet nuts on a metal cart. A city gardener watered the hanging flower baskets.

A barista brewed dark espresso in the corner coffee shop. A mechanic fixed a broken engine in the auto garage. A librarian stamped due dates on borrowed hardcover books. A tailor measured a customer for a custom wool suit.

A museum guide explained an ancient artifact to attentive visitors. A theater actor rehearsed a dramatic monologue on the wooden stage. A hotel porter carried heavy luggage on a brass cart. A chef chopped fresh herbs in a bustling restaurant kitchen.

A crossing guard halted speeding cars for young students. A paramedic drove the bright white ambulance through the busy intersection. A sanitation worker lifted heavy trash bags into the loud truck. A construction worker drilled the hard concrete sidewalk.

A florist arranged red roses in a glass display window. A jeweler polished a diamond ring behind the glass counter. A pastry chef decorated a tiered wedding cake in the bakery. A barber shaved a customer's beard with a straight razor.

A street magician performed card tricks for an amazed crowd. A portrait artist sketched a charcoal drawing of a smiling family. A mime entertained young children near the public fountain. A juggler tossed bright red balls into the air.

A red fox hunted a field mouse in the tall grass. A brown bear caught a leaping salmon in the rushing river. A bald eagle built a large nest in the high pine tree. A gray wolf howled at the bright full moon.

A green frog caught a flying insect near the muddy pond. A spotted turtle sunbathed on a smooth flat rock. A black snake slithered through the dry fallen leaves. A small salamander hid under a rotting wooden log.

A blue jay cracked a hard nut on the wooden fence. A red cardinal sang a loud melody from the oak tree. A brown sparrow hopped across the concrete patio. A black crow scavenged a dropped French fry in the parking lot.

A white tailed deer chewed green leaves in the quiet forest. A striped raccoon washed a stolen apple in the shallow stream. A prickly porcupine gnawed on a rough tree branch. A fuzzy caterpillar crawled up a thick green stem.

A monarch butterfly drank sweet nectar from a purple flower. A fuzzy bumblebee carried yellow pollen to a hidden hive. A green grasshopper leaped across the freshly cut lawn. A black ant carried a heavy breadcrumb to an underground tunnel.

A great white shark hunted a gray seal in the deep ocean. A bottlenose dolphin jumped through a high ocean wave. A sea turtle ate a floating green jellyfish. A large octopus squeezed into a small rocky crevice.

A snowy owl perched on a frozen tree branch. A white polar bear swam across the icy arctic waters. A gray walrus rested on a large floating iceberg. A cute penguin waddled across the thick white snow.

A tall giraffe stretched a long neck for high acacia leaves. A heavy hippopotamus submerged a massive body in the muddy river. A fast cheetah sprinted across the dry African savanna. A large elephant sprayed cool water over a dusty back.
A wild horse galloped across the wide grassy plains. A mountain goat climbed a steep rocky cliff. A desert lizard scurried across the hot red sand. A prairie dog popped out of an underground burrow.

A beaver built a strong wooden dam across the running stream. A river otter slid down a slick muddy bank. A blue heron speared a silver fish in the shallow water. A colorful kingfisher dived from an overhanging branch.

A math teacher wrote a difficult equation on the chalkboard. A young student sharpened a dull wooden pencil at the desk. A janitor swept the dusty hallway floor with a wide broom. A principal announced important news over the loud intercom.

A science teacher mixed colored liquids in a glass beaker. A history professor lectured about ancient Roman civilizations. A gym coach blew a loud silver whistle on the field. A music instructor directed the middle school marching band.

A young child painted a messy picture on the small easel. A school nurse checked a sick student for a fever. A cafeteria worker scooped hot mashed potatoes onto a tray. A school bus driver parked the yellow bus near the curb.

A debate student presented a strong argument to the quiet audience. A chess club member moved a white knight on the checkered board. A drama club actor practiced a loud stage scream. A marching band drummer beat a large snare drum.

A university student typed an essay on a silver laptop. A college librarian shelved returned academic journals. A campus security guard patrolled the dark parking lot. A professor graded difficult final exams in a quiet office.

A kindergarten teacher read a colorful storybook to the class. A young pupil built a tall tower with wooden blocks. A special education aide assisted a disabled child with a puzzle. A parent volunteer handed out sweet snacks to the class.

A biology student dissected a preserved frog in the laboratory. A physics teacher demonstrated gravity with a falling apple. A chemistry student wore clear safety goggles during the experiment. A geology professor displayed rare rocks on a display table.

A high school senior took a difficult standardized test. A guidance counselor discussed career options with a worried student. A football coach yelled instructions to the tired team. A cheerleader practiced a complex acrobatic flip.

A literature teacher assigned a classic novel for weekend homework. A foreign language student practiced rolling Spanish consonants. A substitute teacher struggled with the complicated lesson plan. A hall monitor checked a roaming student for a hall pass.

A preschooler took a quiet afternoon nap on a soft mat. A kindergarten assistant tied a child's loose shoelaces. A music teacher played a simple song on the upright piano. A playground monitor watched children on the metal swings.

A skilled surgeon operated on a critically injured patient. A registered nurse took a patient's blood pressure with a cuff. A hospital orderly pushed a metal wheelchair down the hall. A pharmacist counted white pills into a small orange bottle.

A hospital cook prepared bland dietary meals for sick patients. A custodial worker mopped the slippery hospital corridor. A security guard monitored the hospital entrance cameras. A maintenance worker fixed a broken hospital bed.

A roofer nailed black asphalt shingles onto the slanted roof. A window installer placed a double pane window into the wooden frame. A flooring contractor laid oak hardwood planks in the living room. A drywall hanger screwed gypsum boards to the wooden studs.

A boy built a tall sandcastle on the bright sunny beach. A girl collected smooth seashells near the crashing ocean waves. A father threw a plastic flying disc to a happy dog. A mother applied greasy sunscreen to a child's pale shoulders.

A homeowner mowed the green front lawn with a gas mower. A neighbor trimmed a thick green hedge with electric clippers. A homeowner swept grass clippings off the grey concrete sidewalk. A gardener pulled invasive weeds from a colorful flower bed.

A family roasted white marshmallows over a crackling campfire. A camper chopped dry firewood with a sharp steel ax. A hiker filtered dirty river water with a small plastic pump. A fisherman cast a fishing line into the deep quiet lake.

A woman sewed a torn shirt with a silver needle. A man ironed a wrinkled cotton shirt on an ironing board. A teenager folded clean laundry into a plastic laundry basket. A child placed dirty clothes into a tall wicker hamper.

A home cook baked a sweet apple pie in a hot oven. A neighbor borrowed a cup of white sugar for a recipe. A child licked sweet cake batter from a wooden spoon. A father washed dirty baking pans in the deep kitchen sink.

A woman practiced slow yoga poses on a purple foam mat. A man lifted heavy cast iron weights in the home gym. A teenager ran three miles on an electric treadmill. A grandmother pedaled a stationary exercise bike in the living room.

A cat owner scooped dirty litter from a plastic litter box. A dog owner walked a strong husky on a thick nylon leash. A bird owner cleaned a messy birdcage with soapy water. A fish owner dropped flake food into a glass aquarium.

A backyard grill master flipped hot dogs on a charcoal grill. A guest brought a cold bowl of potato salad to the party. A child broke a colorful piñata with a wooden stick. A host poured sweet lemonade into clear plastic cups.

A woman arranged colorful flowers in a crystal vase. A man hung a beautiful landscape painting on the blank wall. A teenager organized messy books on a tall wooden bookshelf. A child stored small plastic toys in a large toy box.

A court judge banged a wooden gavel on the tall bench. A defense attorney questioned a nervous witness on the stand. A court reporter typed rapid notes on a specialized machine. A jury member listened closely to the difficult complex testimony.

A bank teller counted crisp green bills for a waiting customer. A loan officer explained a mortgage application to a young couple. A bank manager unlocked the heavy steel vault in the morning. A bank security guard stood silently near the glass entrance doors.

A military general reviewed a secret map in a command tent. A young soldier cleaned a black rifle with a small brush. A military pilot flew a fast fighter jet over the desert. A navy sailor scrubbed the metal deck of a large battleship.

A brave firefighter climbed a tall ladder to a burning window. A police detective collected important evidence at a crime scene. A paramedic loaded an injured victim onto a bright yellow stretcher. A rescue dog sniffed the ruins of a collapsed brick building.

A local politician shook hands with citizens at a busy rally. A journalist recorded an interview with a small digital voice recorder. A campaign volunteer handed out colorful flyers to passing voters. A news anchor reported the election results on live television.

A car mechanic drained dirty black oil from a car engine. A tire technician balanced a new car tire on a spinning machine. A car detailer waxed the red exterior of a sports car. A customer waited for the repaired car in a small lobby.

A head librarian hushed a noisy group of teenagers in the library. A college student researched a difficult topic on a library computer. A young boy checked out a stack of superhero comic books. A library volunteer organized the donated books in the back room.

A factory worker assembled plastic toy cars on a moving belt. A quality inspector rejected a defective plastic toy car. A forklift driver moved a heavy pallet of cardboard boxes. A plant manager reviewed the daily production numbers on a clipboard.

A brave astronaut floated weightlessly inside the international space station. A mission controller monitored critical telemetry data on a large screen. A space shuttle technician tightened a large bolt on the shuttle wing. A scientist analyzed a rare moon rock in a clean laboratory.

A watchmaker repaired a tiny mechanical gear with delicate metal tweezers. A cobbler fixed a broken heel on a brown leather shoe. A blacksmith hammered a glowing hot horseshoe on a heavy anvil. A tailor sewed shiny gold buttons onto a dark blue coat.
